name: anthropic.messages.create
description: Anthropic errored call: SDK catches the APIError, persists status='errored' with metadata.error={message, type, status} and output=null. Renderer must show a red-tinted error panel with the human-readable message and the request that triggered it, NOT fall through to an empty assistant message.

error.message: Number of request tokens has exceeded your per-minute rate limit. Please reduce your usage.
